content: Admin panel security pitfalls: (1) IDOR — admin endpoints using user-supplied IDs without server-side authorization check; (2) Vertical privilege escalation — missing role check on admin-only API routes, hiding links in UI is not access control; (3) Horizontal escalation — admin can access other admins' data or act as them; (4) Path inconsistency bypass — /ADMIN vs /admin treated differently by middleware; (5) Multi-step process gaps — access control on step 1 but not step 2 of a workflow; (6) HTTP method bypass — GET can trigger actions protected only on POST; (7) No server-side RBAC check — client-side role checks trivially bypassed.
